method: Prices from Inceptron's own public OpenAI-compatible catalog API https://api.inceptron.io/v1/models (pricing.prompt / pricing.completion, USD per token x 1e6); cross-checked against the rendered https://www.inceptron.io/models page and OpenRouter provider endpoint data (provider_name=='Inceptron'). All three sources agree on the catalog and on GLM/MiniMax prices.

models.notes: fp8 quant, 202K context, 754B. Cache read $0.26/1M. Inceptron model id zai-org/GLM-5.1-FP8. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 1.40 / out 4.40).

int4 quant, 262K context, 1T, multimodal (text+image). Cache read $0.25/1M. Input price is $0.68/1M per api.inceptron.io and OpenRouter; the rendered website models page shows $0.73/1M (minor discrepancy, API value used as canonical). Output $3.50/1M everywhere.
fp8 quant, 196K context, 230B. Cache read $0.05/1M. Inceptron model id MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2.5. Matches OpenRouter Inceptron endpoint (in 0.15 / out 0.90).
